description: Default flash manifest for a full MonoOS image set. Paths are relative to this manifest's directory (build/release/ in a real build tree).
notes: sha256 fields are populated by the release build pipeline (build/scripts/build_bootloader.sh and related signing steps) before this manifest is shipped. An empty sha256 causes flash_image.py to skip verification with a warning -- do not ship a release manifest with empty checksums.
